prompt: i just got my snapdragon x elite dev box and i don't have winml installed yet. python 3.11 is already on the system. give me the actual install commands i should run to get going before i can do anything else.

assertions.text: Recommends Python 3.10 specifically, and calls out that the user's existing 3.11 will NOT work (winml-cli wheel pins >=3.10,<3.11).
Uses `uv venv --python 3.10` (or an equivalent isolated venv command) rather than installing into system Python or a 3.11 environment.

Points to the AITK cache as the wheel source today (e.g., `$env:USERPROFILE\.aitk\bin\model_lab_runtime\cache\winml_cli-*.whl`) and acknowledges PyPI is the planned/future path. Does NOT fabricate a generic `pip install winml` URL as if it works today.
Includes a post-install verification step (e.g., `winml --help` or `winml sys --list-ep`) so the user can confirm the install worked before moving on.
